RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT HANDLERY HOTEL, INC.'s MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-519459, CGC-12-520778 WITH CASE CGC-12-518690 AND PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY JUDGE CURTIS KARNOW. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT HANDLERY HOTEL, INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-519459, CGC-12-520778 WITH CASE CGC-12-518690 AND PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION is Off calendar in light of the Court's ruling on Defendant's demurrers. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ARLENE CAMPBELL, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. ALEX CHRISTOPHER OF COBLENTZ PATCH, DUFFY & BASS LLP, TEL. NO. 772-5718 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT HANDLERY HOTElS, INCORPORATED'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY JUDGE CURTIS KARNOW. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT HANDLERY HOTELS, INCORPORATED'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff does not have standing and amendment will not cure this defect. The demurrers are unopposed. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. Judge: Curtis Karnow, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/CK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alex Christopher, Esq., of Coblentz Patch Duffy & Bass LLP, Tel. 415.391.4800, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Arlene Campbell, Tel. 415.912.6322, Plaintiff appearing on her own behalf.

The matter was discussed. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT HANDLERY HOTES, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with fifteen days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
